title: hersona Attribute
description: Metadata YAML schema for hersona attribute templates (shared across personality / speech / archetype / visual / hobby). Every YAML under attributes/ is validated against this schema.

oneOf.title: BASE metadata (en) with optional i18n overrides

attribute_category.description: Top-level attribute category. As of v1.0+ one of five: personality / speech / archetype / visual / hobby.

attribute_name.description: Unique attribute ID (snake_case, ASCII only, 1-50 chars). Also used as the file name.

display_name.description: Display name in the BASE language (en). Localized overrides go under i18n.<lang>.display_name.

description.description: Attribute description in the BASE language (en). Localized overrides go under i18n.<lang>.description.

i18n.description: Localized metadata overrides keyed by language code (e.g. ja). Each value may override display_name / description for that language.

display_name_ja.description: [legacy] Japanese display name. Superseded by i18n.ja.display_name.

display_name_en.description: [legacy] English display name. Superseded by display_name (BASE).

weight_dimension.description: Intensity dimension of this attribute. none = qualitative trait only, mild = faint, moderate = medium, strong = clearly manifested.

content_lang.description: Language of the persona-content fields (sentence_endings / catchphrases / second_person / tone / examples / core_traits). Drives response-language directives and intensity measurement. Absent is treated as 'ja' for backward compatibility.

typical_value_range.description: Typical value range when used with weighting (e.g. '0.0-0.3', '0.4-0.7', '0.8-1.0'). Optional.

examples.description: Example lines or behavior samples (fully original; no proper nouns or specific works). At least one.

compatible_archetypes.description: List of archetype attribute_names expected to pair well. Empty array allowed.

has_catchphrase.description: Whether the attribute has catchphrases (if true, examples are expected to contain catchphrase candidates). Optional.

variant.description: Variant label of the same attribute_name (e.g. 'light' / 'dark' / 'modern' / 'classical'). Empty string allowed.

tags.description: Tags for cross-cutting search (array of strings, assumed unique). Empty array allowed.

conflicts_with.description: List of other attribute_names that are mutually exclusive / not to be combined. Empty array allowed.

core_traits.description: Array of personality trait tags (personality only, ~3-7). Human-readable labels, same shape as core_traits in power.yaml.

speech_style.description: One-line prose describing how tone, first/second person, sentence endings, and catchphrases interlock (speech only). Same shape as speech_style in power.yaml.

second_person.description: Set of second-person labels on one line separated by '/' (speech only, same shape as power.yaml). e.g. 'you (general, imposing) / buddy (familiar)'.

sentence_endings.description: Array of sentence-ending patterns (ja speech only; English has none). Same shape as sentence_endings in power.yaml.

lexical_markers.description: Characteristic words/phrases of the speech register (used for en speech instead of sentence_endings, e.g. 'gonna', "y'all", 'indeed'). Drives en intensity measurement.

register.description: Speech register (language-neutral). Used mainly by en speech attributes.

catchphrases.description: Array of catchphrases (all categories, ~1-15). Same shape as catchphrases in power.yaml.

tone.description: One-line prose describing voice, tension, and range (all categories). Same shape as tone in power.yaml.

content_i18n.description: Per-language persona content authored natively (catchphrases / tone / core_traits / examples). Keyed by lang code (e.g. 'en'); the BASE top-level fields are ja. Used by render_blend to keep injected catchphrases in the persona's content language.

examples.description: Native usage examples in this language (same patterns as BASE examples; no proper nouns or specific works).
